menu_hint: F11 fullscreen   |   Arrow keys + Space: cursor   |   Type notation in bar below board
menu_pvp_desc: Two humans play on the same computer
menu_ml_ai_desc: Play against a learning neural network
tip_pawn: Pawns move forward 1 square (2 from start) and capture diagonally.
tip_knight: Knights move in an L-shape and can jump over pieces.
tip_bishop: Bishops slide diagonally any number of squares.
tip_rook: Rooks slide horizontally or vertically any number of squares.
tip_queen: Queens combine rook and bishop - the most powerful piece.
tip_king: Kings move 1 square in any direction. Protect yours!
